pi_items.source: Official Sygic GPS Navigation app coverage documentation; ISO 3166-2:US standard naming
Sygic GPS Navigation offline maps hierarchy documentation confirms Hawaii is located under North America > United States region structure

No publicly available Sygic documentation specifies exact map file naming convention. setup_task.sh script searches for '*hawaii*' or '*us_hi*' patterns, which differs from metadata claim of 'us_hawaii' only.
Sygic GPS Navigation for Android official documentation (manula.com) confirms maps directory structure: 'android/data/com.sygic.aura/files/Maps' for Android 4.4+ devices
Official Sygic GPS Navigation app on Google Play Store; confirmed in setup_task.sh and export_result.sh scripts

privileged_info_summary: The task downloads offline maps from the Sygic GPS Navigation app (com.sygic.aura) for Hawaii, a US state. Maps are stored in /sdcard/Android/data/com.sygic.aura/files/Maps on Android devices. Hawaii is accessible through the app's menu hierarchy: North America > United States > Hawaii. The data comes from Sygic's real, publicly available offline map service that provides monthly updated maps for North America including all US states. The task is not synthetic - it involves downloading actual map data from a legitimate commercial GPS navigation application.
